scripts.start: cd backend && npm install && npm start
scripts.ci:schema: cd frontend && npx tsx ../shared/schemas/scripts/generate-snapshots-to.mts ../shared/schemas/.tmp-current && npx tsx ../shared/schemas/scripts/check-breaking-ci.mts ../shared/schemas/.tmp-current
scripts.test:e2e: npm --prefix frontend exec -- playwright test -c playwright.config.ts
